info.name: CST391 Music API (Vercel)
info.description: Next.js API – base URL = your deployed Vercel URL, same /api routes. Set the baseUrl variable to your app (e.g. https://cst391-music-app-psi.vercel.app).

request.description: Returns all albums with their tracks.
Returns a single album (and its tracks) by albumId.
Creates a new album. Required: title, artist, year. Optional: description, image, tracks (array of { number, title, lyrics?, video? }).
Health check: database connection and sample artist.
